channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Musk texted OpenAI's Brockman about settlement two days before trial began
item.description: Elon Musk co-founded OpenAI in 2015 and sued the company, President Greg Brockman and CEO Sam Altman in 2024.

item.title: UAE says it intercepted Iranian missiles for first time since ceasefire began
EBay pops as Ryan Cohen says GameStop could issue stock to pay for takeover of much bigger retailer
item.description: GameStop made a takeover bid for eBay, offering $125 per share in a cash-and-stock deal that values the e-commerce platform at roughly $55.5 billion.

item.title: S&P 500 is little changed as traders eye oil gain, Iran developments; Russell notches fresh high: Live updates
item.description: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite are coming off of a solid week, having notched fresh records on Friday.

item.title: Circle jumps 16% on Clarity Act compromise that preserves stablecoin rewards
item.description: Lawmakers over the weekend reached a compromise on the market structure bill known as the CLARITY Act that keeps stablecoin reward programs intact.

item.title: Last man standing: There's only one software stock left on Josh Brown's Best Stocks list
item.description: It sounds crazy, but Zoom is the last man standing: the only software stock on our list of The Best Stocks in the Market.

item.title: U.S. military denies Iran's claim it struck American warship in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran has blocked tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz since the U.S. and Israel started the war in late February, resulting in supply and price shocks.

item.title: CNBC's Official WNBA Team Valuations 2026: The league has its first $1 billion team
item.description: The average value of a Women's National Basketball Association team is $460 million, according to CNBC's Official WNBA Team Valuations 2026.

item.title: Supreme Court temporarily blocks mail ban on abortion pill mifepristone
item.description: Two drugmakers, Danco Laboratories and GenBioPro, over the weekend asked the Supreme Court to restore the ability to order Mifepristone through the mail.

item.title: Bret Taylor's Sierra raises nearly $1 billion months after last capital push
item.description: Sierra's $950 million Series E funding round was led by Tiger and Google's GV, with participation from Benchmark, Sequoia, Greenoaks and others.

item.title: New college graduates overestimate starting salaries by nearly $24,000, report finds
item.description: Amid a challenging labor market for those just starting out, new job seekers will likely have to recalibrate their earnings potential.

item.title: Trump said $465,000 in retirement savings is 'rich.' Is it?
item.description: President Donald Trump said savers who build a $465,000 nest egg would be "rich." Whether that's true depends on one's perception of wealth.

item.title: ‘Misplaced euphoria’: Markets are sleepwalking into a recession amid Iran war oil price shock
item.description: As US equities hit fresh highs, strategists warn that investors are downplaying the impact of soaring oil prices.

item.title: Oil prices rise as U.S. launches operation to restore freedom of navigation in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The U.S. operation comes after renewed attacks on commercial vessels over the weekend.

item.title: Advanced Micro Devices to give up gains on predictable earnings report, HSBC says
item.description: Advanced Micro Devices has jumped 66% over the past month, but it is likely to lose some ground if its earnings report doesn't exceed expectations, per HSBC.

item.title: Warsh's take on Fed independence is met with confusion and some concern
item.description: Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh is putting his own spin on the independence of monetary policy. Many former Fed officials aren't sold.

item.title: The market's next test could come down to two stocks
item.description: AMD and Palantir results will drive the market this week. Options traders have a bullish tilt on the stocks ahead of the reports.

item.title: Berkshire shares trade higher as Buffett successor Abel scores good marks at meeting, earnings jump
item.description: Many in the investment community were reassured by Abel's firm grasp over Berkshire's sprawling enterprise.

item.title: Meta's public nuisance case in New Mexico has billion-dollar consequences
item.description: Meta is back in a Santa Fe courthouse in a child safety case that could determine whether the company is a public nuisance.

item.title: We're adding to our position in a stock that has gotten cheaper since earnings
item.description: The company's earnings report wasn't perfect, but the long-term story is still intact.

item.title: Pirro appears to drop plans to appeal criminal investigation of Fed Chair Powell
item.description: The U.S. attorney shifted legal strategies in her investigation of Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell just ahead of a deadline.

item.title: CNBC Points Pro: How do I upgrade from economy to first class with credit card points?
item.description: Points expert Jason Stauffer explains what to consider if you want to upgrade your flight with points or miles.

item.title: Private student loan market set to expand under new federal loan caps — with risks for grad school borrowers
item.description: After new federal student loan limits go into effect in July, more borrowers will turn to private lenders. Consumer advocates say that comes with risks.

item.title: 'Godspeed my friend': Inside the final hours of Spirit Airlines
item.description: Spirit Airlines ceased operations overnight after a failed government bailout.

item.title: Weight loss and hair loss: The growing hair treatment market from GLP-1s
item.description: A common side effect of many GLP-1 drugs is hair loss. It's creating a formerly untapped but growing market for hair treatment products.

item.title: Used EV sales are surging — how their ownership costs compare to gas-powered cars
item.description: With more affordable electric vehicles hitting used-car lots, buyers should be aware of some ownership costs that may differ from those that come with gas cars.

item.title: Greg Abel earns solid scorecard from Berkshire shareholders after first annual meeting
item.description: The reviews from longtime shareholders and professional investors were broadly positive, even as many acknowledged the notable absence of Warren Buffett.

item.title: Palantir gets a downgrade and a lower price target from HSBC ahead of first-quarter earnings
item.description: Palantir reports after the market close on Monday. Increased competition is making the investment bank less confident.

item.title: AI chipmaker Cerebras targets $3.5 billion raise in IPO
item.description: The share sale could give the company a valuation of up to $24.5 billion, compared with $23 billion as of February.

item.title: Pirro reveals new Trump attack evidence; Cole Allen removed from 'suicide precautions'
item.description: Until U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro's comments, prosecutors had not disclosed whose bullet hit the agent.
